nasb.text: Go therefore to the main highways, and as many as you find there, invite to the wedding feast.’

esv.text: Go therefore to the main roads and invite to the wedding feast as many as you find.’

cnv.text: 所以你們要到大路口，凡遇見的，都請來參加婚筵。’

ccb.text: 所以你们到街头巷尾，把所有见到的人都请来。’

csbs.text: 所以你们要到大街小巷去，把所见到的人都请来赴宴。’
